user_instructions: read the plan, it have mutliple phase, we need exactly to have these, make the smaller atep by step for phase 0, anlayse in details and make sure be ready for exactly this final plan

phase_summaries.1: Phase 1 delivered the identity and account-management backend for TypeTalk: Prisma models and migrations for users, identities, sessions, organizations, devices, email challenges, and security events, plus working Fastify routes for email OTP auth, Google sign-in/linking, refresh/logout, profile management, session management, and current-organization/member access. The main implementation landed in `prisma/schema.prisma`, the Phase 1 migration files, `src/modules/auth/service.ts`, `src/modules/
phase_summaries.2: Phase 2 built the backend sync layer for TypeTalk: dedicated device management endpoints, synced user preferences, organization-scoped dictionary CRUD, writing profiles, app profiles, and the shared idempotency infrastructure needed for safe repeated writes. The main work landed in `prisma/schema.prisma` and the Phase 2 migration, `src/lib/idempotency.ts`, `src/lib/json-bounds.ts`, the new `src/modules/devices/*` and `src/modules/preferences/*` modules, plus expanded integration coverage in `tes
phase_summaries.3: Phase 3 built TypeTalk’s Stripe billing and entitlement layer: database-backed plan seeding, billing read APIs, Stripe Checkout and Customer Portal endpoints, raw-body Stripe webhook verification, durable webhook receipt and retry processing, and the unified `GET /v1/entitlements/current` API. The main work landed in `prisma/schema.prisma`, the Phase 3 migration and `prisma/seed.ts`, the new `src/modules/billing/*` and `src/modules/entitlements/*` modules, the retry entrypoint at `src/jobs/webho
phase_summaries.4: Phase 4 built Google Play billing on top of the existing Stripe billing system, adding durable `purchase_tokens`, `POST /v1/billing/google-play/verify-subscription`, `POST /v1/billing/google-play/restore`, `POST /v1/webhooks/google-play/rtdn`, Google acknowledgment retry handling, and Google-aware unified entitlement and billing reads. The main work landed in `prisma/schema.prisma`, the Phase 4 migration, `prisma/seed.ts`, `src/modules/billing/google-play.ts`, `src/modules/billing/google-play-su
